---
title: "Home"
---

# Welcome

Hi, I’m Sami Bazzi.

This website is my course portfolio. It includes a short introduction about me and a link to my group project.

## Group Project

You can view my group project here:

https://yangkun-a.github.io/ad688-employability-sp26A1-group2/introduction.html
## What’s on this site

- About Me
- Group Project
- Course portfolio content
